sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104299" key="tocianoi/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τοξ-ιᾱνοί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n104299.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">persons born under Sagittarius,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.112</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Τοξινιανοί</foreign> cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
